structuredUpload.declarationBannerTitle: Required first step: download, sign and upload the declaration
structuredUpload.declarationBannerInstructions: Before uploading your documents, you must download this responsible declaration, sign it, and upload it in the corresponding section on this page.
structuredUpload.contractBannerInstructions: Download this contract for your reference. Commission terms will be completed later by our team.
